title: GetRobotFCOn Function
description: This identifies with which robot the force control function is active.
examples:
Function TestGetRobotFCOn Int32 iVar ' Use Int32 or Int64 type Robot 1 FCKeep FC1 CF, 5 ' Continues the force control function by virtue of the qualified CF parameter Print GetRobotFCOn ' Bit 1 is displayed when Force Control Function is active on robot 1 iVar = GetRobotFCOn' Save status on variable FCKeep FC1, 5 ' Force Control Function is inactive when FCKeep stops Print GetRobotFCOn ' Bit 0 is displayed when Force Control Function is inactive on robot 1
Fend
